sentences.sentence: First, wet your paper thoroughly.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (wet, thoroughly)

sentences.sentence: Next, tape down all four edges.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (tape, edges)

sentences.sentence: Then, mix your base color.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (base, color)

sentences.sentence: Apply a thin wash across the entire background first.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (background) and consonant cluster (-cr- in across)

sentences.sentence: Blend the edges gently so the colors flow together smoothly.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (flow_together) and reduced syllable (together)

sentences.sentence: Rinse your brush thoroughly before switching to a darker shade.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nse in Rinse, -tch in switching) and linking (switching_to)

sentences.sentence: Lastly, let the painting dry completely before adding any fine details or a signature.
sentences.structure: fronted Lastly-clause + compound closer with or
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (before adding, or a) and final consonant cluster (-ls in details)

sentences.sentence: Loaner laptops are kept nearby.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (kept, nearby)

sentences.sentence: Please silence your phone inside.
sentences.phonetic_focus: basic vowel distinctions (silence, inside)

sentences.sentence: Print jobs can be released from any station in the lab.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (print jobs) and consonant cluster (-ls- in released)

sentences.sentence: Software licenses can be accessed through the student portal.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (can_be accessed) and consonant cluster (-cts- in accessed)

sentences.sentence: Password resets take only a few minutes to complete.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-sts in resets) and compound noun stress (Password resets)

sentences.sentence: Wireless printing is available throughout the entire building.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (wr- in Wireless) and linking (is_available)

sentences.sentence: If your device will not connect to the network, check the troubleshooting guide posted beside the help desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if your_device, connect_to) and final consonant cluster at phrase boundary (-sk in desk), stress-timing over 18 words

sentences.sentence: The waiting area is just ahead.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (just, ahead)

sentences.sentence: Appointments can be scheduled through the online portal.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-nts in Appointments) and linking (can_be scheduled)

sentences.sentence: Walk-in visits are accepted every weekday morning before noon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lk- in Walk-in, -pt- in accepted)

sentences.sentence: Prescription refills are typically processed within two business days.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllable in multi-syllable word (typically) and consonant cluster (-scr- in Prescription)

sentences.sentence: Please have your insurance information ready at check-in.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (check-in) and reduced syllables (insurance, information)

sentences.sentence: Students who arrive without an appointment may need to wait for the next available slot.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-nts in Students) and reduced function words in rapid sequence (for the), stress-timing over 15 words

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure about your appointment time, check the daily schedule posted near the reception desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_are) and final consonant cluster (-sk in desk), stress-timing over 17 words
